name: Necrosphere64
short_description: An adventure that will test your skills using only 2 buttons!
detailed_description:
Enjoy your stay in the afterlife.


Features [sic]:

  • State-of-the-art 64×64 pixel resolution
  • 2-button controls, and neither of them jumps
  • Ultra-minimalist approach to Metroidvania
  • Proudly short: About 2—3 hours long
  • Collectibles, power-ups, and bosses like every game
  • Instant respawn — dying is a core mechanic
  • Hard and frustrating (it's a feature)
  • Speedrun-friendly: in-game timer and almost no RNG
  • Bespoke soundtrack by Patricia Taxxon (complete album at bandcamp: patriciataxxon)

Join our discord to chat with the developers and community!

From super casual players to turbo speedrunners, you are very welcome!!
